_comment: Data sources configuration. Copy to sources.json and fill in credentials.
_comment_scopes: Multi-scope support (#100): define scopes array for multiple connect servers × orgs. Each scope uses org_id (UUID) as immutable identifier.
_comment_legacy: Single-scope format (backward compatible, used when scopes array is absent):
_comment_notifications: Optional: configure notification delivery for watchdog and auto-assign alerts
_comment_health_endpoints: Optional: service endpoints for health diagnostics page
